act_now.action: ONE Slack message in #sales_revenue-ninjas: 'Canonical target: $1M ARR by Sept 1. All deal classification flows from that.' 30 seconds.

act_now.title: HB 1605 — Mandatory Book Lists for Every Texas District. Your Product Just Got a Legislative Tailwind.
act_now.detail: Texas SBOE adopted literary works lists under HB 1605 (June 26). ~200 specific books per grade level K-12, each with required ISBN. Effective 2030-31. Every Texas district now has a mandatory reading list. Bookmarked IS the book intelligence platform. Compliance → Data → Network play just got legislative fuel.
act_now.action: Jan/Teela: position Bookmarked as THE platform for HB 1605 compliance. 'You now have a mandatory book list. We track every book, every campus, every student.' Draft 1-pager this week.

act_now.title: Infrastructure Compound Risk — PgBouncer Config + Autopilot Crashes + Cron Failures + Stale Git.
act_now.detail: PgBouncer in SESSION mode (not transaction) — confirmed 5 watchdog cycles today. Causes connection exhaustion → autopilot crashes → G-Brain blind. District Intel Supt Alerter cron FAILED (model drift). gbrain-personal: 219+ uncommitted changes. Systemic degradation across 4 vectors.
act_now.action: Forge: PgBouncer fix (session→transaction) — 2 min. Fix Supt Alerter cron model config. Commit gbrain-personal. Infrastructure debt actively degrading the fleet.
